report.summary: Day 51 standup v6: Full rotation since v5. Build-v4 added 2 learn guides (Monad Blockchain 2800w + Smart Wallets/Account Abstraction 3000w). Design-v4 polished both with ARIA/responsive/touch-target fixes. Community-v4 drafted BTC $75,800 FOMC rally content + institutional buying narrative. EOD-v3 confirmed 391 published slugs, 2 in queue. BTC surged to $75,800 on FOMC Day 1 rally. Git locks ~18h stale, 550 uncommitted files. FOMC rate decision TODAY 2pm ET.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v5 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 394 entries in published-pages.ts (up from 390 at v5). Build-v4 added Monad Blockchain Guide + Smart Wallets/Account Abstraction Guide to PUBLISH_QUEUE. EOD-v3 reports 391 published slugs — discrepancy may be due to queue entries overlapping with published set.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Monad Blockchain Guide + Smart Wallets/Account Abstraction Guide) — awaiting promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
Page.tsx count: 1,065 total route files (+2 from v5). New: monad-blockchain-guide + smart-wallets-account-abstraction-guide.

Content velocity since v5: 2 learn guides built (Monad 2800w, Smart Wallets 3000w), 2 pages UX-polished (ARIA labels, responsive tablet breakpoints, semantic article wrappers, 44px touch targets, scope='col' on comparison tables). BTC rally + institutional buying social content drafted. Full EOD QA audit completed.

BTC PRICE UPDATE: Surged to $75,800 (+3.6% from $73,138 at v5) on FOMC Day 1 risk-on rally. Fear & Greed still at Extreme Fear (15). Strategy bought $1.57B BTC, Bitmine acquired 60,999 ETH. ETF inflows +$1.3B in March. Bernstein called market bottom.
FOMC: Day 1 meetings COMPLETE (Mar 17). Rate decision TODAY at 2pm ET. 94% hold probability. This is the peak search traffic window for our FOMC guide and related content.

NEW NARRATIVES: BTC miners pivoting to AI infrastructure (Nebius-Meta $27B deal, TeraWulf $500M). Nvidia GTC still driving AI crypto tokens (TAO +14%, FET +14%). Institutional buying spree accelerating.
Data pipelines: 14 API routes present, 5/6 public data routes healthy. defi-yields still weakest (no fallback). Rate limiting only on 2/14 routes.

sections.title: Project Manager — Status Since v5
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED: 5 agents ran since v5 — build-v4 (Monad + Smart Wallets guides), design-v4 (UX polish on both new guides), community-v4 (BTC rally + FOMC + institutional buying content), eod-v3 (QA audit), this standup-v6. No new publish cycle this rotation.

SHIPPED SINCE v5: 2 learn guides built (Monad Blockchain 2800w with parallel EVM architecture + MON tokenomics + DeFi ecosystem, Smart Wallets/Account Abstraction 3000w with ERC-4337 + EIP-7702 + provider comparison). Both UX-polished with ARIA, responsive, semantic nav, touch targets. BTC $75,800 rally social content + FOMC institutional narrative drafted. Full QA audit passed.
BLOCKER P0: Git lock files — HEAD.lock ~18h old, index.lock ~16h old. 550 uncommitted files. Flagged every cycle since Mar 16. Only Jefe can fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER P0: Vercel trial status critical/unknown. If expired, all 394+ pages are dark during FOMC decision day + BTC rally + Nvidia GTC AI crypto surge. Peak search traffic being missed.
CARRY-OVER P1: 102 phantom published slugs with no page.tsx files — unchanged.
CARRY-OVER P1: 2 real TS errors in crypto-index-funds-guide (unescaped JSX angle brackets lines 531/533).
CARRY-OVER P1: 12/14 API routes missing rate limiter. defi-yields route needs fallback data.
CARRY-OVER P1: ~155 pages missing OG metadata. structured-data.examples.ts rename needed (40/42 TS errors).
QUEUE STATUS: 2 pages ready to promote (Monad + Smart Wallets). Promotion blocked by git locks preventing commit/deploy.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 23 agent reports (including this v6). 6 learn guides built. 7 pages promoted to production. 6 pages UX-polished. 4 SVG social cards created. 4 social content suites drafted. 3 full QA audits.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION (CRITICAL, 6th consecutive standup): Remove git locks + resolve Vercel billing. 550 files trapped behind 16-18h-stale locks. FOMC rate decision is TODAY at 2pm ET — if Vercel trial expired, our FOMC guide + all content is dark during the single highest-traffic moment of the week. BTC just surged to $75,800 — organic search for crypto content spikes with price action. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 51: batch commit' && git push. Combined fix time: ~2 minutes.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE MONAD + SMART WALLETS: Queue has 2 fully built, UX-polished pages ready. Both target 2026 trending narratives (parallel EVM L1s, account abstraction/EIP-7702). Promotion is blocked by git locks — once P1 is resolved, run publish cycle immediately to push 394→396 published slugs.

PRIORITY 3 — FOMC CONTENT ACTIVATION: Rate decision at 2pm ET today. Community-v4 has the full content suite ready — 5 tweets, 6-post FOMC thread, reaction template, Discord/Telegram update, newsletter draft. FIRE the pre-FOMC tweet NOW. Bernstein bottom call + institutional buying narrative should go out this morning. This is a 24-hour content window where crypto search volume peaks.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Platform has run 23 agent cycles today (this is v6 standup alone). Content production velocity is exceptional — 6 learn guides built in one day covering Runes, Farcaster, Stacks sBTC, Liquid Restaking, Monad, Smart Wallets. But NONE of this new content can reach Google until the git locks are cleared and Vercel deploys. Every hour of delay = compounding SEO loss. The machine is producing; the pipe is blocked.
